allow: Bash(docker exec homey_db psql -U postgres -d homey_db -c "\\dt")
Bash(docker exec homey_db psql -U postgres -d homey_db -c ":*)

Bash(docker exec homey_db psql -U postgres -d homey_db -c "SELECT deviceName, zone, COUNT\(*\) as antal, MIN\(createdAt\) as forsta, MAX\(createdAt\) as senaste FROM ""TemperatureLog"" GROUP BY deviceName, zone ORDER BY antal DESC LIMIT 20;")

Bash(docker exec homey_db psql -U postgres -d homey_db -c 'SELECT ""deviceName"", zone, COUNT\(*\) as antal, MIN\(""createdAt""\) as forsta, MAX\(""createdAt""\) as senaste FROM ""TemperatureLog"" GROUP BY ""deviceName"", zone ORDER BY antal DESC LIMIT 20;')
Bash(docker exec homey_db psql -U postgres -d homey_db -c 'SELECT ""deviceName"", zone, COUNT\(*\) as antal FROM ""EnergyLog"" GROUP BY ""deviceName"", zone ORDER BY antal DESC;')

Bash(docker exec homey_db psql -U postgres -d homey_db -c 'SELECT ""deviceName"", ""sensorType"", ""isVisible"", zone, ""capabilitiesToLog"" FROM ""SensorVisibility"" ORDER BY ""sensorType"", ""deviceName"" LIMIT 30;')

Bash(docker exec homey_db psql -U postgres -d homey_db -c 'SELECT ""consumptionSinceMidnight"", ""totalMeterValue"", ""costSinceMidnight"", ""createdAt"" FROM ""MeterReading"" ORDER BY ""createdAt"" DESC LIMIT 5;')
Bash(docker exec homey_db psql -U postgres -d homey_db -c 'SELECT   \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM ""TemperatureLog"" WHERE ""createdAt"" < NOW\(\) - INTERVAL ''''7 days''''\) as temp_older_7d,:*)

Bash(docker exec homey_db psql -U postgres -d homey_db -c "SELECT \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM ""TemperatureLog"" WHERE ""createdAt"" < NOW\(\) - INTERVAL ''7 days''\) as temp_older_7d, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM ""EnergyLog"" WHERE ""createdAt"" < NOW\(\) - INTERVAL ''7 days''\) as energy_older_7d, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM ""MeterReading"" WHERE ""createdAt"" < NOW\(\) - INTERVAL ''7 days''\) as meter_older_7d;")
Bash(docker exec homey_db psql -U postgres -d homey_db -c "SELECT pg_size_pretty\(pg_database_size\(''homey_db''\)\) as total_db_size;")

Bash(docker exec homey_db psql -U postgres -d homey_db -c "SELECT indexname, tablename, pg_size_pretty\(pg_relation_size\(indexrelid\)\) as storlek FROM pg_stat_user_indexes ORDER BY pg_relation_size\(indexrelid\) DESC;")

Bash(docker exec homey_db psql -U postgres -d homey_db -c "SELECT indexrelname, relname as tabell, pg_size_pretty\(pg_relation_size\(indexrelid\)\) as storlek FROM pg_stat_user_indexes ORDER BY pg_relation_size\(indexrelid\) DESC;")

Bash(docker exec homey_db psql -U postgres -d homey_db -c 'SELECT ""consumptionSinceMidnight"", ""consumptionSincePreviousReading"", ""totalMeterValue"", ""createdAt"" FROM ""MeterReading"" ORDER BY ""createdAt"" ASC LIMIT 5;')
Bash(docker exec homey_db psql -U postgres -d homey_db -f /tmp/fix_zones.sql)
